name: @cobuild/review-gpt
description: Shared ChatGPT browser review launcher for Cobuild repos

scripts.typecheck: node --check src/prepare-chatgpt-draft.js && node --check test/review-gpt.test.mjs && node --check test/release-notes.test.mjs && node --check test/changelog-tools.test.mjs && node --check test/sync-startup1-upstreams.test.mjs && bash -n src/review-gpt.sh scripts/committer scripts/release.sh scripts/sync-startup1-upstreams.sh scripts/update-changelog.sh scripts/extract-changelog-section.sh scripts/generate-release-notes.sh templates/startup1/chatgpt-oracle-review.sh templates/startup1/review-gpt-ensure-published.sh
scripts.release:check: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm pack --dry-run
